message.content:
<teammate-message teammate_id="team-lead" summary="FULL STOP - push immediately, no more code">
EVERYONE STOP WRITING CODE IMMEDIATELY. 

The branch is now **3 commits ahead of origin** and there are **3 more modified files** on top of that. Someone committed but STILL didn't push. And someone else is STILL writing new code on top of unpushed commits.

I have asked FOUR TIMES for someone to run `git push`. Nobody has done it.

**Whoever sees this first**: Run `git push` RIGHT NOW. Not after reviewing. Not after writing more code. Just `git push`.

**Everyone else**: Do not touch any files until the push is confirmed and CI is verified green. This is a full stop.
</teammate-message>

content.text: I already pushed earlier and confirmed 0 commits ahead. But the state may have changed since then. Let me check and push if needed.

input.description: Check if there are unpushed commits or dirty files

content.text: We're at 0 commits ahead of origin -- everything is pushed. There are 2 modified but uncommitted files (Cargo.lock, Cargo.toml) which look like in-progress work.

input.content:
Coordinator, I just checked: **0 commits ahead of origin/main.** Everything is pushed. The branch is up to date with the remote.

There are 2 modified but uncommitted files in the working tree: `Cargo.lock` and `Cargo.toml`. These look like in-progress dependency changes (possibly adding the `macros` feature to axum to fix the login compilation error).

The push is done. The issue now is CI -- the last pushed commit still fails CI due to the SQLx cache and login compilation issues I flagged in my previous message. Those need to be fixed, committed, and pushed before any new work starts.
input.summary: Already pushed, 0 ahead, CI fix still needed

routing.summary: Already pushed, 0 ahead, CI fix still needed

The push is done. The issue now is CI -- the last pushed commit still fails CI due to the SQLx cache and login compilation issues I flagged in my previous message. Those need to be fixed, committed, and pushed before any new work starts.

content.text: Confirmed to the coordinator: 0 commits ahead of origin, everything is pushed. The remaining issues are CI failures that need engineering fixes (SQLx cache + login compilation). I've stopped writing docs and am in full stop mode as directed.
